meaning: n.凤凰,长生鸟,完人,完美之物
examples: Mr. Brooke moved on from LA to Phoenix.
Phoenix Players present 'Juno and the Paycock'.
Out of the ashes of the economic shambles, a phoenix of recovery can arise.
The open conditions of the frontier were ideal for Jewish merchants, like the Goldwaters of Phoenix.
Newcomers include Houston, riding high on oil profits, and Phoenix, lifted by a housing boom.
